name: mcp-oss-onramp
description: MCP server for high-precision OSS issue scouting. Supports MCP_OSS_ONRAMP_GITHUB_TOKEN for PR cross-referencing and avoiding rate limits.
long_description: MCP server to scout beginner-friendly OSS issues with high precision using GitHub GraphQL. It supports a hybrid authentication mode using environment variables or the GitHub CLI.

tools.name: scout_issues
tools.description: Scout a GitHub repository to discover truly available, beginner-friendly issues.
